reference_machine: Apple M5 Pro MacBook Pro, 18 cores, 48 GB RAM
refreeze_reason: The July 17 pipeline refreeze binds the completed citation-grounding repair, including canonical comparison projection, later-version clause observation, Korean attribution and disposition guards, and the two-fact model schema. invalidation_rule: Re-measure and re-freeze when the model, prompt scheme, retrieval pipeline, corpus, or reference machine changes.
